embeds.title: Prompt 24u porto command
embeds.description:
In beta-bot.py, replace the hardcoded TARGET_CHANNEL_IDS list for the 24-hour porto feature with a dynamic, per-guild configuration system. Add two new admin-only slash commands:

/set-porto <channel> — sets the text channel where that server's daily porto code will be posted.
/stop-porto — disables the daily porto code for the current server.
Persist the mapping of guild_id → channel_id to a JSON file (porto_channels.json), following the same pattern used for the existing log-channel system (load_porto_channels / save_porto_channels helpers, loaded in on_ready). Update send_code_to_target() to iterate over the stored channels instead of the hardcoded list. Keep the existing Dutch-language response style and the ephemeral=True replies consistent with the other admin commands.
